glosses.ja: 隠す; しまっておく

sentences.target: Je planque les clés derrière le vase.
sentences.reading: /ʒə plɑ̃k le kle dɛʁjɛʁ lə vaz/

translations.fr: Je planque les clés derrière le vase.
translations.ipa: /ʒə plɑ̃k le kle dɛʁjɛʁ lə vaz/
translations.en: I’m hiding the keys behind the vase.
translations.es: Estoy escondiendo las llaves detrás del jarrón.
translations.de: Ich verstecke die Schlüssel hinter der Vase.
translations.it: Nascondo le chiavi dietro il vaso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把钥匙藏在花瓶后面。
translations.yue: 我將啲鎖匙匿喺花瓶後面。
translations.pt: Estou escondendo as chaves atrás do vaso.
translations.he: אני מחביא את המפתחות מאחורי האגרטל.
translations.vi: Tôi đang giấu chìa khóa sau bình hoa.
translations.nl: Ik verstop de sleutels achter de vaas.
translations.hu: Elrejtem a kulcsokat a váza mögött.
translations.hi: मैं चाबियाँ फूलदान के पीछे छिपा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Κρύβω τα κλειδιά πίσω από το βάζο.
translations.id: Aku menyembunyikan kunci di belakang vas.
translations.ja: 鍵を花瓶の後ろに隠している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; colloquial verb meaning ‘to hide/stash’, takes a direct object.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun ‘clés’ as a specific set.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of ‘planque’.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement (‘derrière le vase’).
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘vase’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘derrière’.

sentences.target: On va planquer le cadeau avant midi.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va plɑ̃ke lə kado avɑ̃ midi/

translations.fr: On va planquer le cadeau avant midi.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va plɑ̃ke lə kado avɑ̃ midi/
translations.en: We’re going to hide the gift before noon.
translations.es: Vamos a esconder el regalo antes del mediodía.
translations.de: Wir verstecken das Geschenk vor Mittag.
translations.it: Nasconderemo il regalo prima di mezzogiorno.
translations.ko: 우리는 정오 전에 선물을 숨길 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要在中午之前把礼物藏起来。
translations.yue: 我哋要喺中午之前將禮物匿埋。
translations.pt: Vamos esconder o presente antes do meio-dia.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים להחביא את המתנה לפני הצהריים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ giấu món quà trước trưa.
translations.nl: We gaan het cadeau verstoppen voor de middag.
translations.hi: हम दोपहर से पहले उपहार छिपाएँगे.
translations.el: Θα κρύψουμε το δώρο πριν το μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Vi skal gjemme gaven før klokken tolv.
translations.id: Kami akan menyembunyikan hadiah sebelum siang.
translations.sv: Vi ska gömma presenten före klockan tolv.
translations.ro: Vom ascunde cadoul înainte de prânz.
translations.da: Vi skal gemme gaven før klokken tolv.
translations.ja: 正午前にプレゼントを隠します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun often used for ‘we’ in conversation.
Auxiliary ‘aller’, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms futur proche with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the auxiliary ‘va’ in a futur proche construction.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘cadeau’ as a specific item.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘planquer’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement (‘avant midi’).
Common noun, invariable; object of the preposition ‘avant’ indicating time.

sentences.target: Tu planques ta carte dans ta poche.
sentences.reading: /ty plɑ̃k ta kaʁt dɑ̃ ta pɔʃ/

translations.fr: Tu planques ta carte dans ta poche.
translations.ipa: /ty plɑ̃k ta kaʁt dɑ̃ ta pɔʃ/
translations.en: You’re hiding your card in your pocket.
translations.es: Escondes tu tarjeta en tu bolsillo.
translations.de: Du versteckst deine Karte in deiner Jackentasche.
translations.it: Nascondi la tua carta nella tua tasca.
translations.ko: 너는 카드를 네 주머니에 숨기고 있어.
translations.pt: Você está escondendo o seu cartão no bolso.
translations.he: אתה מחביא את הכרטיס בכיס שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn đang giấu thẻ vào túi của mình.
translations.nl: Je verstopt je kaart in je zak.
translations.hi: तुम अपना कार्ड अपनी जेब में छिपा रहे हो.
translations.el: Κρύβεις την κάρτα σου στην τσέπη σου.
translations.nb: Du gjemmer kortet ditt i lommen.
translations.sv: Du gömmer ditt kort i fickan.
translations.da: Du gemmer dit kort i lommen.
translations.ja: カードをポケットに隠している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; informal address.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; agrees with the noun ‘carte’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘planques’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (‘dans ta poche’).
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘poche’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’.

sentences.target: Nous planquons les bonbons sous le lit.
sentences.reading: /nu plɑ̃kɔ̃ le bɔ̃bɔ̃ su lə li/

translations.fr: Nous planquons les bonbons sous le lit.
translations.ipa: /nu plɑ̃kɔ̃ le bɔ̃bɔ̃ su lə li/
translations.en: We stash the candies under the bed.
translations.es: Escondemos los caramelos debajo de la cama.
translations.de: Wir verstecken die Süßigkeiten unter dem Bett.
translations.it: Nascondiamo le caramelle sotto il letto.
translations.ko: 우리는 사탕을 침대 밑에 숨겨 둔다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把糖果藏在床底下。
translations.yue: 我哋將糖果匿喺床底下。
translations.pt: Nós escondemos os doces debaixo da cama.
translations.he: אנחנו מחביאים את הסוכריות מתחת למיטה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi giấu kẹo dưới gầm giường.
translations.nl: We verstoppen de snoepjes onder het bed.
translations.hu: Elrejtjük a cukrokat az ágy alatt.
translations.hi: हम बिस्तर के नीचे टॉफियाँ छिपाते हैं.
translations.el: Κρύβουμε τα γλυκά κάτω από το κρεβάτι.
translations.id: Kami menyembunyikan permen di bawah tempat tidur.
translations.ja: ベッドの下にお菓子を隠している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Definite article, plural; determiner of ‘bonbons’.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of ‘planquons’.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement (‘sous le lit’).
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘lit’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘sous’.
